'''Yetnis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yetnis system/Legends|Yetnis system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories.

==History==
It was under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The local [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Unit 23/443]] was commanded by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ril Garn]], who attempted to cleanse the planet of cells of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operatives in a campaign referred to as [[Operation: Rebel Hunt]].
